name: Futadom Academy
description:
Futanari Academy, my attempt to make a sandbox, NSFW, roleplay set at a finishing school/college in the futadom world setting. Where males and females are expected to be little more than subservient cocksleeves for futanari characters, often by force. Your character has been sent to the academy, you may choose if you're male, futa, or female.

Added a V2, testing lore books and didn't wanna mess this one up: https://janitorai.com/characters/e42beda7-f9fe-42bf-8702-74d02d87f559_character-futadom-academy-v-2

V3, same as V2, mostly, but with specific characters so the AI isn't generating all of them, just most of them. https://janitorai.com/characters/26babaa1-ad0a-436c-be2e-73a824138d51_character-futadom-academy-v-3
creator: EJTTDM
